It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Veterans are the reason we’re free
body:
Honoring our nation’s heroes, showing gratitude to these men and women

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cyJubYL5ZDQ4hwsV2MxZLQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Thanks to our veterans, the freedoms we enjoy today have been preserved. Honoring our nation’s heroes, showing gratitude to these men and women, guarding their legacy, and honoring their brave sacrifices is incredibly important. [**As we approach Independence Day, I hope you’ll show heroic Americans that their sacrifices are revered and remembered by signing this “Thank you, veterans!” card.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27099%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6fFIgsenG4o5xVJumMosmQ&sysid=1)
---
[Sign this thank you card for veterans!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27090%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XN2ob7SmeGhaSbuHcOh6Wg&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cyJubYL5ZDQ4hwsV2MxZLQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend we’ll pass along your signed Thank you card to veterans like George Ciampa, a veteran of D-Day who stormed the beaches of Normandy at the age of 18, Vince Speranza, who was a machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge when he was only 19 years old, Carl Felton, who left home at the age of 17 to fight in World War II and was also there, and Willie Clemons Jr, who served in World War II and all those decades later was only ever officially thanked for his service when we flew him out for this years’ National Memorial Day parade in Washington D.C. For some of these veterans, this could be one of the first times they’ve ever been officially thanked for their service to our nation. Throughout our history, freedom has been preserved because of the sacrifices made by American Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen and Marines.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cyJubYL5ZDQ4hwsV2MxZLQ&sysid=1)
---
Every day, we lose legends of World War II, the Korean War, and the Vietnam war. While we have the opportunity to show service members of every generation how grateful we are for their dedication to protecting individual liberty, we must do so. And, we must ensure that all Americans, especially young Americans, fully appreciate -- and never forget -- the sacrifices made by those who have worn the uniform. [**Help express your thanks by signing this thank you card for our veterans before the 4th of July.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27091%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s1WW%2b546nHzzJ%2fKvxRA4Ng&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cyJubYL5ZDQ4hwsV2MxZLQ&sysid=1)
---
Please hurry, Friend -- there isn’t must time left. We need to gather signatures from thousands of patriotic Americans to show veterans that we honor their sacrifices, no matter where their lives have led them. Our country’s greatest heroes are inspiring, and remind us of who this nation is at our very best. A reminder we all need during this time in our history. Veterans’ greatest sacrifices have protected our beloved freedoms, and they deserve to know that Americans are grateful for their service, and wish to honor their legacies. [**Before July 4th, please sign this thank you card!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27092%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O4z%2fWztHpojZufyMfJQDPQ&sysid=1)
---
[Sign this thank you card for veterans!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27090%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XN2ob7SmeGhaSbuHcOh6Wg&sysid=1)
---
Thank you, and God bless, Tim Holbert American Veterans Center
---
[**Support American Veterans Center**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27093%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M3Gt7IjxHWML%2fkoVWupLgA&sysid=1)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Your America News
---

[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8051%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=y153vk3lWCpSBUvxtuBM9A&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27094%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nuW1QjlJu8RsLgPFZ9wm0Q&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27005%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JfoGvhk6yBKp0YI24J%2bcBw&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8051%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=y153vk3lWCpSBUvxtuBM9A&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpfa1iv139g9lqd2hog3c8a83kkltks922rik84o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jm4o36c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7og6io16il5jfjae6ofvgvmq1p2q4grl3tm36c8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jm4o36c9h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm8nkjbh9pp7399jh7labb7gh3df232b91af6od0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jm4o36c9h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6275r1pf9ht21sdlpc443a6la8ug02j0dbh1smg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jm4o36c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: Tim Holbert
subject: Sign the birthday card for Legendary Tuskegee Airman James Harvey!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/cqdbwa_SscCiTJ6OWLkA-g)
---
Friend, Can I count on you to take just a moment out of your day to **wish a very happy birthday to an American military legend?** Legendary Tuskegee Airman **Lieutenant Colonel James H. Harvey III (U.S. Air Force, Ret.)** turns 100 years old July 13th! [_**SIGN COL. HARVEY'S BIRTHDAY CARD****>>**_](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/jttn35QxYxyQeNM2I9JIfw) Last year AVC was privileged to have Col. Harvey serve as the Grand Marshal of our National Memorial Day Parade.
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/gsVPaolJRJfHgIcNCoVxbw)
---
And we've also been privileged to record [_**Col. Harvey's oral history**_](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/-U12ywb2cQANVfEcW-M5_A) for our archives.
---
[**Col. Harvey's Story**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/i9YGPuNla3dMZyziS61buA)
---
Friend, you'll want to take the time to watch this amazing interview -- because **Col. Harvey's story is truly one for the history books**. In 1943, Harvey joined the U.S. military, and went on to serve as a pilot with the 332nd Fighter Group, which would come to be known as the legendary **Tuskegee Airmen**. Harvey was stationed at Godman Field in Kentucky following Japan's surrender. And it was there, in 1949, that he received word that the USAF was planning its first official weapons meet - the very first 'Top Gun' style weapons competition in history. **Harvey represented the Tuskegee Airmen at that very first "Top Gun" event** , along with fellow African-American pilots Capt. Alva Temple, 1st Lt. Harry Stewart and 1st Lt. Halbert Alexander. Their legendary team dominated the event from start to finish, although their victory was not officially recognized by the Air Force until 1995. Col. Harvey would later go on to become**the first African-American jet fighter pilot to engage in combat during the Korean War**. He flew 140 missions in the Korean War and was awarded the Distinguished Flying Cross for his bravery in action.
---
[**Col. Harvey's Story**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/2xu0qjbfr3zWMRNUxalCMg)
---
Friend, you'll undoubtedly be inspired by Col. Harvey's amazing story -- literally, one for the history books! -- and his quiet courage in the face of both racism and enemy fire. [_**SIGN COL. HARVEY'S BIRTHDAY CARD****>>**_](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/N6-bbUqJg3kaBZi-jUzzqg) Friend, **your signature on Col. Harvey's birthday card is big**** _THANK YOU_****for his many decades of service** to our nation -- not just in the military, but also through years of work alongside AVC to ensure the legacies of America's veterans are never forgotten. [_**So please take just a moment to add your name and a brief message of thanks to Lieutenant Colonel James H. Harvey's birthday card.****>>>**_](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/rsAl7BakCii-jXnpLSf17A) It's AVC's privilege to guard the legacies and honor the sacrifices of _all_ our nation's veterans alongside great Americans like Col. James Harvey. And **it's a privilege to honor our heroes with the support of kind and patriotic friends like you, Friend** , who believe the stories of _all_ America's military veterans are worth preserving! So, thank you for your support, and for your signature on Col. Harvey's 100th birthday card! [_**SIGN COL. HARVEY'S BIRTHDAY CARD****>>**_](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/kgo2AjcAAqdFgZ2qxDF8mg) Sincerely, Tim HolbertPresidentAmerican Veterans Center
---
[**Support American Veterans Center**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDA2MTcifQ/dxHKfbd85pZBrSwyz7vtiw)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center

Friend, you'll want to take the time to watch this amazing interview -- because Col. Harvey's story is truly one for the history books. In 1943, Harvey joined the U.S. military, and went on to serve as a pilot with the 332nd Fighter Group, which would come to be known as the legendary Tuskegee Airmen. Harvey was stationed at Godman Field in Kentucky following Japan's surrender. And it was there, in 1949, that he received word that the USAF was planning its first official weapons meet - the very first 'Top Gun' style weapons competition in history. Harvey represented the Tuskegee Airmen at that very first "Top Gun" event , along with fellow African-American pilots Capt. Alva Temple, 1st Lt. Harry Stewart and 1st Lt. Halbert Alexander. Their legendary team dominated the event from start to finish, although their victory was not officially recognized by the Air Force until 1995. Col. Harvey would later go on to becomethe first African-American jet fighter pilot to engage in combat during the Korean War. He flew 140 missions in the Korean War and was awarded the Distinguished Flying Cross for his bravery in action. Friend, you'll undoubtedly be inspired by Col. Harvey's amazing story -- literally, one for the history books! -- and his quiet courage in the face of both racism and enemy fire. Friend, your signature on Col. Harvey's birthday card is big THANK YOUfor his many decades of service to our nation -- not just in the military, but also through years of work alongside AVC to ensure the legacies of America's veterans are never forgotten. It's AVC's privilege to guard the legacies and honor the sacrifices of all our nation's veterans alongside great Americans like Col. James Harvey. And it's a privilege to honor our heroes with the support of kind and patriotic friends like you, Friend , who believe the stories of all America's military veterans are worth preserving! So, thank you for your support, and for your signature on Col. Harvey's 100th birthday card! Sincerely, Tim HolbertPresidentAmerican Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. I have obtained EXCLUSIVE documentation which proves that the California GOP (CAGOP), specifically CAGOP Chairwoman Jessica Patterson along with California RNC national committee woman Harmeet Dhillon and committee man Shawn Steel are trying to amend the bylaws regarding the Presidential delegation process in California as it relates to the RNC's nomination of the 2024 GOP nominee.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b09f491e-3c82-4a26-be62-0d3817064a3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/98de9032-c52e-46c6-b55d-87e0f27085bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This won't be good for President Trump.
Essentially, the CAGOP is trying to amend the "winner take all" standard for the California delegation process (which has been in place for years) so they can award delegates to the GOP candidate who comes in second place as a way to counter delegate wins for President Trump in New Hampshire and Iowa since California has 169 delegates, which is the most delegates out of any state in the country. If the current national polling trends were to remain the same until the California GOP primary, the proposed bylaw amendment to California's allocation of convention delegates could possibly result in more than 50 of California's 169 delegates being allocated to Ron DeSantis, who is currently polling in second place after President Trump, who has a 40 point national lead over DeSantis as the GOP frontrunner.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/57ca3903-5244-4ade-99e5-bacd278daf85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is worth noting that the authors and cosigners of this proposed bylaw change, including Jessica Patterson, Harmeet Dhillon, and Shawn Steel, all could have proposed the change in 2020, when President Trump was the uncontested candidate on the ballot for President, but they didn't. Thus, it begs the question...why now?
It appears as though the CAGOP is amending the bylaws in an effort to tip the delegate scale in favor of Ron DeSantis, who is currently polling in second place after President Trump. Earlier California polling at the beginning of Ron DeSantis's campaign showed him leading Donald Trump, but following two indictments and a massive opposition research file dump on Ron DeSantis, President Trump has skyrocketed in the polls and is undeniably the national GOP frontrunner. Knowing that DeSantis is now trailing Donald Trump by over 30 points, the CAGOP appears to be scrambling to implement their backup plan which could possibly shave up to or more than 50 delegates off of President Trump's California delegate count. Doing so would significantly boost DeSantis's delegate count, and possibly rob Donald Trump of the GOP nomination via California delegates in a brokered convention given that DeSantis is unlikely to win the New Hampshire and Iowa primaries.
As previously reported in June, this is a strategy that has been concocted by CAGOP to transfer delegates from President Trump and move them over to Ron DeSantis in an effort to undermine President Trump and hinder his chances of securing the GOP nomination for President since it is unlikely that DeSantis will win the Iowa and New Hampshire primaries.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/eb6045d8-c823-495a-a10d-038aee695d8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
RINO Speaker of the House and California Congressman Kevin McCarthy works closely with CA GOP ChairwomanJessica Patterson, whose name appears on these exclusively obtained documents. The byline of the document I have obtained clearly indicates that the proposed bylaw amendment was sent from Jessica Patterson on June 17, 2023 at 11:42 am to Danielle Cullum and Bryan Watkins, and it also shows that Patterson ccd Harmeet Dhillon and Shawn Steel.
Th email from Jessica Patterson with reads,
> "Please see attached proposed bylaw amendment submitted on behalf of the 3 RNC national committee members Harmeet, Shawn, and myself."
Jessica Patterson signed this proposed bylaw amendment which she proposed and signed along with CA National committee members Harmeet Dhillon and Shawn Steel. The CAGOP is set to vote on this bylaw amendment at their next Executive Committee meeting on July 29th in Irvine, CA at the Irvine Marriott Hotel at 9:30 am.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/be331ec9-d134-424b-b2ff-4d19c137a7d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This has been kept a secret from California Republicans in a dubious effort to hoodwink California voters and to allocate election decision making to a small group of establishment Republicans in California as opposed to allowing the Republican voters of California to select their preferred GOP nominee without interference. Following publication of my previous report, members of the CAGOP leadership, including former anti-Trump CAGOP Chair Ron Nehring, who also served as Ted Cruz's spokesperson for his 2016 Presidential campaign against Donald Trump in 2016, attacked me on Twitter and called me a liar regarding the information I have exposed and made available to the public.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5cb224b5-011b-4855-a898-290e61ce960a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Little did they know that I have been in possession of the documentation which proves what I have claimed regarding CAGOP's conspiracy to sabotage President Trump via a bylaw amendment regarding the way California will allocate Presidential primary delegates in the 2024 GOP Presidential primary.

CAGOP has been trying to keep their dirty trick and deceptive procedural ploy a secret, but I'm blowing the whistle on their blatant effort to sabotage President Trump and prevent him from securing the 2024 GOP nomination. It cannot go without saying that their diabolical plan to undermine President Trump and the will of California GOP delegates and voters directly traces back to Speaker of the House and CA GOP Congressman Kevin McCarthy.
Immediately following publication of my report, iconic GOP strategist and longtime Trump confidant [Roger Stone tweeted](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b3f88740-2aa3-4ade-b1b4-c24cad227212?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/967a5671-e152-4e09-9365-17fd18c0321a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> **" California has always been "Winner takes all" state. Ronald Reagan swept the primaries there in both 1976 and 1980. The Kevin McCarthy controlled CA GOP is trying to undermine [@realDonaldTrump](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f7426bc7-62b4-4434-9be3-b5a4b5566679?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and help Tiny D."**
As the race to the White House continues to heat up amid the 2024 GOP Presidential primary, Kevin McCarthy's lack of an endorsement for President Trump's re-election continues to be the elephant in the room.
Last week, [following the publication of my exclusive and damning report which exposed the fact that Kevin McCarthy has been directing his top donors to hold fundraisers for President Trump's 2024 opponents,](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/878781c7-d6d4-4ac8-b3b5-4bb33b3b86c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [McCarthy went on CNBC and said he doesn't think President Trump is the strongest GOP candidate ahead of 2024](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c78e7147-dc5f-4447-b55b-27a788d77287?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Last week, I joined former Trump advisor Steve Bannon on his show War Room to discuss how Kevin McCarthy is scheming and plotting behind the scenes to undermine President Trump's 2024 re-election, and how McCarthy is aiding Trump's opponents by weaponizing the establishment GOP donor class.
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9511fedf-e1ce-47c4-962b-ecbb1a2105ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Unsurprisingly, McCarthy had no problem using President Trump to secure his endorsement in January 2023 when McCarthy ran for Speaker of the House. Yet, even with President Trump's endorsement, McCarthy struggled to receive support for his bid for Speaker of the House, which took 15 separate votes on the floor of the House to make him Speaker since so many Republican representatives, including many who have endorsed President Trump for re-election in 2024, adamantly opposed McCarthy's Speakership.
Kevin McCarthy is a snake, and he always been. It's long past the time that President Trump and his advisors face the fact that Kevin McCarthy is not a Trump ally, and he never has been. Endorsing Kevin McCarthy for Speaker of the House in 2023 is a mistake that is coming back to haunt President Trump and his re-election in real time. However, it's not too late for President Trump to politically chop this snake's head off before the snake is able to strike and spew his venom again.
Due to the concessions that were agreed upon during the contentious Speaker of the House vote in January 2023, which established that the Speaker's chair could be vacated if one member of the GOP Congress called for a Motion to Vacate, McCarthy has been walking on a tight rope. It is time for a brave member of the House GOP to call for a motion to vacate the chair. As has been [reported](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/77db2dca-6858-4aba-96a0-2d0a19369d1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
> **" the ability of a single House lawmaker to propose a motion to "vacate the chair" -- or to bring to the floor a vote of no confidence in the speaker -- had been a key sticking point for some of the Republicans who opposed McCarthy's bid to be Speaker."**
McCarthy knows he is bound to the concessions he agreed to during his contentious bid for Speaker of the House, and it is for this reason alone that he has likely directed his lapdogs in the CAGOP, including CAGOP Chairwoman Jessica Patterson to undermine Donald Trump behind the scenes by changing California's longstanding "winner takes all" delegate process as it relates to the California Presidential primary.
Be sure you're following Laura Loomer on[ Twitter ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dc3ba3a1-8b1b-4b9b-961f-441d5b6dc696?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and [Truth Social ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/802683a1-d9c2-4e4d-86d1-750217580b31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)so that you never miss any of her exclusive reports and updates.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: God Bless the U.S.A.
body:
| | |
---
_"Our Constitution — like the Declaration of Independence before it — was predicated __on a simple truth: One's liberty, not to mention one's dignity, was something __to be shielded from — not provided by — the State.”_ **Justice Clarence Thomas**
---
---
I have never been more grateful for our Founding Fathers and our founding documents. After the recent Supreme Court rulings, it is clear that without them our liberties would already be completely lost. We were truly blessed to have had founders who had studied history, understood the nature of men, and knew that our rights come from our Creator – not government. Enjoy this day with your family and friends. Use it as an opportunity to refresh your knowledge about our history and recommit yourself to the fight for our country. God Bless America! Jenny Beth Martin

name: American Action News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvm4mp4acffb4qiq0t2i0ih96lgb2s074uulanao_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn87u9m682d5m7ajqb946njt4bim5mkthm7eagtg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7i8o25mev8p9jjk2329jumrqnjp2uvouksqvso_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zehsgcn1onhvftvrl1uhdevhag97akvomfljhe50_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9u3ho4jogic7jjf370ckbsglfbi2u2885rvf7ao_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo4v7tauk93o4cmeaaupu4j9dv9q020m5hgiokso_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cpg69pj4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8sau6tugo36is020hj9j8tkjrvd4c7gajrsq9b0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z54dhkaa1q40tcod8uj6c3of70cmb4dh5rh17thg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqu3or5v2t0j9rutpdp4rtqfo0ub6pia0hl9504o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1a5rtgb3dpn9g40rm73vkur1v67nd0s7jlfhr1o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zecdh34v5hfocbn00sibmigsnbdh934k8foui8qg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z92aud60jhuubquhp65ujphiok42sn6d4gp2ru3o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s5jmaor4cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Celebrating Independence Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi- I just wanted to quickly wish you and your family a safe and happy Independence Day! We don’t say it nearly enough, but we are SO blessed to be able to live in the United States of America. When our nation was founded, it was with a set of ideals and principles that are just as important today as they were more than 200 years ago. Every day that I have the opportunity to represent this district in the General Assembly is a day that I strive to uphold those principles: life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. My prayer is that I never let you down. Happy 4th!
---
---
| |
---
| **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh****House of Delegates, 85th District** 1-757-598-1733 District Office1-804-698-1185; Room E425 Pocahontas Building [karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/5b99aee002353997/8ffe13cc11fcdc8ec3d6b838967d376c/37923)

# TUESDAY, JULY 4, 2023
---|---
**Good morning! **July 4th, the year's most patriotic holiday, commemorates the adoption in 1776 of the Declaration of Independence. On the same day, 87 years later, the Union turned the tide in the Civil War. It's a day for backyard hot dogs, beer, and fireworks with friends and family. The Flyover wishes you a happy Fourth! In today's edition, we're covering the arrival at last of the flying car long promised to us, the release of almost all remaining classified documents on the JFK assassination, and a hard travel weekend at airports snarled with delays and cancellations.

Have any suggestions? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71u9CAQAJ8GurNglz8XFJ_0yd2lTWmBWZ83wsfJIWfl7aOkvnpGI837db4mrny_vaWdYl_bnJbOT5qVv5gL4AyyxJUICCVF7UIwbrQe5RZdGTGErDRaBzokgx50IkhLyDrTIjmCAlReGTVaq3Gw6L11AYHWPOZShFFUuLdj-Gh87xut9bs96RiWtssat94fAv8JmARM53m-sH4ZTl99F_jfKHnE8ji5Vv50Xhh12xPXv1h_ufYTAAD__xsoTpE) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS3W9eXHMDB0YUu6VOpogbnUtE6oHGSUt6-6ez860vd5na-hbOXxdQt3ci3XOSytHDSDuqC9oJiRJ5eJkAQnN2qjhEajRr46kzXKkAhj0piUjTGbOOUIi5VkreLFIaAAhXYEOYIeIE5GqCAkqQlkEEwCpdLqPnzX8mgr5e1VD9qHpd755tbWfp9MvDH0DH3vfchhoVjrz3_A0H-s5LfX-0H7jfqToee7S-EoiUk4ObZz4F8AAAD__8ycUlk). Enjoying _the Flyover_? ## Planning for America's 250th Birthday Kicks Off
The commission planning [America's 250th anniversary](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQBp8GOiOz_oPCRZrrLm1KtNjLsZExJ2MdubePSJ32-0Yaab7u0x05cX584ka-LvuEofKLJumEFqAmaKNfiIBUS763w6DtaJxqV9-PA9jeaO2CihAsUphdxJ6sGrSk2LIHCUo6qeVoTK86o5wzdlBAyzzOMTYXxnUv3ffOua60pPf-otKFfWuTX2t9Ho36aODWwO08z27Zf0wM193ALdN5XDsVEpgKYXyLZ8KcOT8EblQ44CHAyLqKmUtdI74FZwESbFt8fJ6cEh_WNVo-NuT0p63_RvgNAAD__7kSXcw) celebration in 2026 formally kicks off its campaign today in Milwaukee at a Brewers-Cubs baseball game, where fans can record a video telling their own American story. The challenge of the "America 250" commission will be designing a celebration that brings a divided country together. [The bicentennial](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ_G7ojWLD92QfE16fK1V1oYlngjjHOYJMrbn3L1laNpRvN1mS-eM5frf7-Ra2mffWj8pBmsUELiLPvoEpEk7MkNZhyVmbTFfnUjejVAinFYCEMcVTLDOFijJlhkSqFnJ0EiWFAwaT3gSaO12owoKS3TEmOngCK3vZ5uO5e2Usrv_Un1FPatz25t7X50-K-T506e_b3Q6_ioD9TGIVMnz1JDW4UvhZ9UD1_f4nGI2yO_hRKBMi3VN96LOGjj7weXQKVRKeyzINQek7bLpKUxmAyANkGqCGS8TdBXF-8vzpkPYzsF181z_m1rf576CQAA__9mbWm0) faced similar issues in 1976 in the aftermath of Watergate, yet it became a national success. The 250th anniversary does have one unique challenge: Technically, it's the _semiquincentennial_ celebration. It's not clear if Americans will ever want to say that out loud.
## Economy's Center of Gravity Shifts South
The six [fastest-growing states in the South](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OszAQAJ8GukXrHwwuKL4mXb72SmTwGnwydmQ2QXn7U66-dorRaL7u893FFPP23x00cSizWzm-aMYBNEg1y9ZPgUiSamkSZhy1sf2g2n1ClEIsOlijTHBIaIUdB-9HIVEbRW2cJEqFA2q0fS9U16th6M2oJIXFLt43GslHLrX7LjHzTiG9y4tqt5ajTdPO_Dgb9a-Rt0beruvqlpyXVMqxUN261TXy5kAgwhJTiiXDRS7xDkfcquMP4Jj4hOcJtJZcjjecsFJmqlACbNW9Ir_hLE_eQXTCKquNaevkH9fHeJqh0bgdLqbfJP5z0E8AAAD__zjLZ2Y) now contribute more to the national GDP than the Northeast _Washington-New York-Boston_ corridor. According to Bloomberg, the movement of people and corporations south since the Pandemic has steered $100 billion in new income to states such as Florida, Texas, Georgia, the Carolinas, and Tennessee. The Northeast, by contrast, lost about $60 billion. The economic shift southward follows an ongoing migration of people moving out of high-tax blue states [into low-cost red states](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWBmPMwNDFW7p2tM7mSK7CEAGJ0z591c7df-mXvo_LegGKlK7vcKBrIa-wN3riKgwfuVSr7LwLiBJVh26Y5nmcrDaquzkrwIx6CoMVFlTQW5i9GIz0QXo72a0jJ4VUwohRWK0H1WtljJ5mJTFsdvOejQI9tVz6z0yp3TDEr_zE0u_56KK7tXavTL0xuTC5nOfZh_zaHpUS1vrbMLkEhPYoWJlc9nzcIRFWXjDmHRry-kh8w9g4FATe8AWVQ6HvnLArzt9PipHqZNgorgdQ_Bu3fxl-AgAA__8UzWC3). Companies say they're saving millions by relocating to the Sun Belt.
## Electric Flying Car Ready for Pre-Orders
A California company building [an electric flying car](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uxCAQhJ8Gd5zwYoxdUKRxd2lTWvwsdxtxBmHik98-cuo008xo9On7uq93S4m2x6d9oWkxr9Y3OnAVmg8c5ApdMBERUHZo-nGahnFWWnZPE0YpvHPKo5j1iNFr3w-I1s29U_0UOzIgQAotBjEr1cubklqrcZKA0c0uBDYIDNRyvX1n2toTYzrzgfXm86tL5tla2Zn8YLAwWLaz5L1dFYPlOmawCH1Fz2B555rCziPVvfH4k9LJMaFvlTyP6aTtwb2t3JZS84GBu5NHa7ndArfeY2nXolTMNWDdGSxdNaG8KSXaR80G8XhZSn9g7V9NvwEAAP__WxRqNA) is now taking pre-orders. Alef Aeronautics received FAA approval to road/air test its "Model A" car. Alef said the car drives on roads and parks like a standard car but also has [vertical takeoff and landing capability](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuhDAQRL_GdKBlF2NTuEjj7tKmRD57DY6MOXHWkfv7iNRpRiONNE_v6zbfXMqpLJ9uY1PjPjtf04tnUO3QIs3YBBOZkalh049aD-MkFTWrIQegAO96dF5OxL3XBKMn1rLvEWSTDAISKBhgkrKnTpJSctSEHO_TPQQxAIdU96P73lOpK8f83l98dH7fmmzWWh9PQR8CrUB7nmfnS7k2gfZ6FmhBXXG1yn4VaGN-p7K03h1tdE6gTSXwT7fWLTeHCY8z5ZyeoxIDLJtL-Q9V_xX_DQAA__-8WlZB). It can carry one or two passengers and has a road range of 200 miles and a flying range of 110 miles. The company expects to sell the car [for $300,000 each,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQxvGn0Q6HAxSvoEhz3aVN6SC76Gb2xAHujG-fudSpv1_xzf_rPt09MW3Lp3-gqzFNPlR64SStMELpSbXgIqJC3aK7DONohmtvdbs6Kf0ANmrtZ4OzBtuPMmgAY-MAo7EtOSWVllYaee37i-56bW0_jFphnK8zQGMkAtWUu-9EW10x8plemLuQHi27tda9NPqjUbdG3Y7j6GL6mZ-FNizlbRp1qxjWLXFazjdJmaGISLlUEZ_Mp0DGUDMFEfmkbRHBZ-H3PacXgphPEb0XPgTc63vdM6YMmEubHewHMVMZbGPk8vDEf7fqv5F-AwAA___SwGy7) with the first delivery by the end of 2025 -- assuming the prototype tests are successful.

➤** The National Archives** says it has now posted 99% of the documents relating to the assassination of President John Kennedy. ([Archives Here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz72OqzAQxfGnsbsgM_6CwsVt6HLbLZGxxzBZE0fYAu3br5J6219xjv5f9_nuKdNz_e93dC2V2YdGJ87C3tQN5Aw8uoQIKDm63gyDMqO2km-u10osBqCHIcoIFoeYggCfVDDWBOTkQIAUVigxat3LTktrtRkkYFrGJUamBEZq5egehZ5tw5R_yolHF8rOs9tae1Um_zGYGEzXdXX-CBudWLu1nAymAyu-icH0SN8fyOgrvm_54eLropypGsuUWHdP-TPc_sz8DQAA__8j21MZ)). The release was delayed multiple times, and there's no detail on the 1% that's still classified. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OnDAURp_GdCBz_QeFizTuJm1K5MHXw50Ye4QdyL79anbbbb9POjo6f27LzVOi_Pjtd7QtlsWvjU5cuOllD2KBLtiICCg6tKOeJqlnZUS32TBFz7XCUY_Sa66ND1KMUc_jGAMXqiMLHAQ3XPJZqVEMShij9CQA432-h8Akx0CtHMOzUG4bxvRRTjyGtexdsltrr8rELwaOgbuua1hzfn8M3JvMwHHNwAnOwL1KokZrZeCe8W_va_W1UvaNSu5DWf_tmFvtvwefen-sG51Y-wNPwouBoxzw_7C1PXWHDa-LUqKqDZP8sXtKX1Ltx0SfAQAA__-HzWfZ))➤** Moms** for Liberty, a parental rights group, says it will expand its efforts in 2024 to engage in school board elections across the country. The effort will set up a battle with teachers' unions over parents' input into children's education. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL_G7ohgF1hSULwmXV57pYVhiTnhEGGUKH9_ytVXjqYZzdd1uYZSy_32P-zsR25LiKM8eZEktABcYE4-MwPjzF5Z57Q9G8J58zEbzMQxrBwVsiNJxGxlyjI5sjgXDxJQktTybIzCk0EiYx0C5_W8pjRpyamM1k_frdzHxrm-25P7KbZ9rn4b43FM-G-CywSX8Ljz6_ioD_RRYuUJLnvbD5FbF7Ws3MdbHHFrrYq1hZ5ED5EPARK0MKhUjErFZA0FqRkQQdkQyWFyGefu0-NVai2HpUnL2x5K_S0Zf375CQAA___-DGJc))➤ **A** **civil rights** group has filed an equal-rights complaint against Harvard over its use of legacy admissions. The complaint, filed with the Department of Education, claims legacy admissions are the equivalent of "white affirmative action." ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPozAQRn-N6RyZscFQUFxDl2uvRBN7gDkZHNkTVvn3q2y99Sd97-n9uy935MTn9hcPmmTNCwbhixbjtdNgF2jitBIB2Yamth8G14-dt80-DesI1pGDNXZgDJrYGyIM0TqMvmsbnsCANd44M3Zda2-d9b7rBwu0PsZHjMoZiiy53P5nPmWnNb3zReUW8tGkaRd5VmX_KJgVzLLTzil9NgVzoe2VUDifCuaQX0X0A0USVQWzM3607ah3LBeWqFcMVHXgi5MuvO1SdcjHMyGfoj9AzVJ1og3DW2M8uFbO5-epKVN8fnFKXHuvnNkO5B-FRn6N9R0AAP__JIptQA))➤ **Widespread** rioting in France eased after five days of violent protest in response to the police shooting of a Muslim teenager. There was less violence and fewer arrests Sunday night, though curfews remain in force. clean_body: The commission planning America’s 250th anniversary celebration in 2026 formally kicks off its campaign today in Milwaukee at a Brewers-Cubs baseball game, where fans can record a video telling their own American story. | | | | | | TUESDAY, JULY 4, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! July 4th, the year's most patriotic holiday, commemorates the adoption in 1776 of the Declaration of Independence. On the same day, 87 years later, the Union turned the tide in the Civil War. It's a day for backyard hot dogs, beer, and fireworks with friends and family. The Flyover wishes you a happy Fourth! In today's edition, we're covering the arrival at last of the flying car long promised to us, the release of almost all remaining classified documents on the JFK assassination, and a hard travel weekend at airports snarled with delays and cancellations. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Planning for America's 250th Birthday Kicks Off The commission planning celebration in 2026 formally kicks off its campaign today in Milwaukee at a Brewers-Cubs baseball game, where fans can record a video telling their own American story. The challenge of the "America 250" commission will be designing a celebration that brings a divided country together. faced similar issues in 1976 in the aftermath of Watergate, yet it became a national success. The 250th anniversary does have one unique challenge: Technically, it's the semiquincentennial celebration. It's not clear if Americans will ever want to say that out loud. Economy's Center of Gravity Shifts South The six now contribute more to the national GDP than the Northeast Washington-New York-Boston corridor. According to Bloomberg, the movement of people and corporations south since the Pandemic has steered $100 billion in new income to states such as Florida, Texas, Georgia, the Carolinas, and Tennessee. The Northeast, by contrast, lost about $60 billion. The economic shift southward follows an ongoing migration of people moving out of high-tax blue states . Companies say they're saving millions by relocating to the Sun Belt. Electric Flying Car Ready for Pre-Orders A California company building is now taking pre-orders. Alef Aeronautics received FAA approval to road/air test its "Model A" car. Alef said the car drives on roads and parks like a standard car but also has . It can carry one or two passengers and has a road range of 200 miles and a flying range of 110 miles. The company expects to sell the car with the first delivery by the end of 2025 -- assuming the prototype tests are successful. (). The release was delayed multiple times, and there's no detail on the 1% that's still classified. ()➤ Moms for Liberty, a parental rights group, says it will expand its efforts in 2024 to engage in school board elections across the country. The effort will set up a battle with teachers' unions over parents' input into children's education. ()➤ A civil rights group has filed an equal-rights complaint against Harvard over its use of legacy admissions. The complaint, filed with the Department of Education, claims legacy admissions are the equivalent of "white affirmative action." ()➤ Widespread rioting in France eased after five days of violent protest in response to the police shooting of a Muslim teenager. It will take a month to get there and then begin a six-year survey of distant galaxies. Funny stories helped too, but people got the most boost from news of people practicing "moral beauty." name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c01ad5b624f407c89930b6912618f27&_e=kanqlXCag8ZfgRtXPmX5A3yipDI2hFT3rfiwwjDbImCxsg-OBK4BK572g1uIIy5d0s5xfn6dix91MgNt5DmoWCTan3mrQUXyG0-csEi1MUZE06jU1IMLjpYZr1Ib-3V8F8rhaDLTBjo6C02Fr_zEyKCNRGKr7ZqpNntYGJX8vuWc6WxxDTfh3t_P13tqnP7dj08d0A2jQWtnINgoz4-SzlGdwyDLQrUQ-jEfCesaY2vVZ8pFBsuiY705SUK2JyF5y_3U7G58ne7iUT1Lem5OGTRQFP_M_w5E86zVvA98ahrQXjcXl_TEHpNVml1AF8rj5lYWsMNOxsjJZQrWv4VQxqFweDfnnk37TfoEBRaE3balaoURTzw9wR5DkpDlGsqiFtBleMABT5CLwHvZATiTyYwOo2Ez6WlnmFT354BU79M%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c01ad5b624f407c89930b6912618f27&_e=kanqlXCag8ZfgRtXPmX5A3yipDI2hFT3rfiwwjDbImCxsg-OBK4BK572g1uIIy5d0s5xfn6dix91MgNt5DmoWCTan3mrQUXyG0-csEi1MUZE06jU1IMLjpYZr1Ib-3V8F8rhaDLTBjo6C02Fr_zEyKCNRGKr7ZqpNntYGJX8vuWc6WxxDTfh3t_P13tqnP7dj08d0A2jQWtnINgoz4-SzlGdwyDLQrUQ-jEfCesaY2vVZ8pFBsuiY705SUK2JyF5y_3U7G58ne7iUT1Lem5OGa911_0ga8LvlvLUTH4z0yuEMdUmJ7uNK9mqhW8gmLsA6Xcy8n_Rus34fGa_dVvlOGkTmYqz8N9IAC96_utV-NItDeUSkSf3Twde8A7v-jWKp-5UWBqvrFSzVEWQGlJS7di-wriS-UqUknIF_vAw8dU%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c01ad5b624f407c89930b6912618f27&_e=kanqlXCag8ZfgRtXPmX5A3yipDI2hFT3rfiwwjDbImCxsg-OBK4BK572g1uIIy5d0s5xfn6dix91MgNt5DmoWCTan3mrQUXyG0-csEi1MUZE06jU1IMLjpYZr1Ib-3V8F8rhaDLTBjo6C02Fr_zEyKCNRGKr7ZqpNntYGJX8vuWc6WxxDTfh3t_P13tqnP7dj08d0A2jQWtnINgoz4-SzlGdwyDLQrUQ-jEfCesaY2vVZ8pFBsuiY705SUK2JyF5y_3U7G58ne7iUT1Lem5OGcatYgFZ3MBFw_vYPyxJh5N9rw6Ztig1kOtAwyjw688AsTSskRkM8-NQ0-gh1YJkreyfyzKb-vDb7RkVygh1II2CJERMu-nZzFMhYhPYe_IPZ0NjkCBPNJFXpXY__d6VoG16gZkP5GiZpMGdUaYwrqI%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c01ad5b624f407c89930b6912618f27&_e=kanqlXCag8ZfgRtXPmX5A3yipDI2hFT3rfiwwjDbImCxsg-OBK4BK572g1uIIy5d0s5xfn6dix91MgNt5DmoWCTan3mrQUXyG0-csEi1MUZE06jU1IMLjpYZr1Ib-3V8F8rhaDLTBjo6C02Fr_zEyKCNRGKr7ZqpNntYGJX8vuWc6WxxDTfh3t_P13tqnP7dj08d0A2jQWtnINgoz4-SzlGdwyDLQrUQ-jEfCesaY2vVZ8pFBsuiY705SUK2JyF5y_3U7G58ne7iUT1Lem5OGdTXeNtUW-T1_7XvBAq6BjsqOPjcRc2TC7OdWNHVuA5I9_qz1-domoOavyz_PpEP72lLllf9D42QxzA26dKJ2ob2fYvLbyzBpHGRHCH63LcYb7tSpCe5XzCc7rHEaXpeGXWldhX8a104PoFM0Venxb4%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04ee0084ded94effb8b8160f19207c1d&_e=zUduPrinepr6oF6I7WtA-PE4RHHQ05Zm4V7Cc1IxEHNFOQku7JY4ftq75iIsqmrUnA5ybJ2NvrjjwIAkTAl7liLuTgORC2v60uHE4Lqd7N4cA3pj40nT4H-8DPwDa6uEdsI_Anddwdd_D1mOUrUG-hOdONITKKWLyFHelbujxXaC03b0YlV7l2-xyEQNgtUXnHyPXPjXNEzmuULSPrQKXfcb8QQ6mznwRQ4tYOP6lxqfhQUQ4j0x8Ub4RTuSuHdbmmdU-jJcJ0gBVgnGGpokj9eLb8AQ5SaODUZeJCnl4q2YVujJFuqCDlcSkq2Pql6rAsCvi0rLwuN2596rF7DyU7hNNiOrGqZnRq3xsbSWyCBI0SNzfzubsZMwiUBBFa3vg2PB88uW8wEZfYIVtPmF1w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04ee0084ded94effb8b8160f19207c1d&_e=zUduPrinepr6oF6I7WtA-PE4RHHQ05Zm4V7Cc1IxEHNFOQku7JY4ftq75iIsqmrUnA5ybJ2NvrjjwIAkTAl7liLuTgORC2v60uHE4Lqd7N4cA3pj40nT4H-8DPwDa6uEdsI_Anddwdd_D1mOUrUG-hOdONITKKWLyFHelbujxXaC03b0YlV7l2-xyEQNgtUXnHyPXPjXNEzmuULSPrQKXfcb8QQ6mznwRQ4tYOP6lxqfhQUQ4j0x8Ub4RTuSuHdbKUitQL-kVglMfs6_a7aVlx5VkDDnG3VPgIQdgmsfWFOjYkkHF1fQjxHXCMNn16HRXXqQqXutI4060CowCfKGdpZf9IoTmXlM9Uazp6tb_R3EFyT9QsV5YI0k9DLW88WjVOar-LqcZwHuIgzlBFj2qg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04ee0084ded94effb8b8160f19207c1d&_e=zUduPrinepr6oF6I7WtA-PE4RHHQ05Zm4V7Cc1IxEHNFOQku7JY4ftq75iIsqmrUnA5ybJ2NvrjjwIAkTAl7liLuTgORC2v60uHE4Lqd7N4cA3pj40nT4H-8DPwDa6uEdsI_Anddwdd_D1mOUrUG-hOdONITKKWLyFHelbujxXaC03b0YlV7l2-xyEQNgtUXnHyPXPjXNEzmuULSPrQKXfcb8QQ6mznwRQ4tYOP6lxqfhQUQ4j0x8Ub4RTuSuHdbu_dTviG_1SEncqcqXQJ5eAoSRDzGR5MpLikbPk0810nnMSCLNP4yjDvBQ0pXuz5xN7f4ZKboxyl1QroZ6vDx6DskGKaO9cT6IRpUB1dPVHpoGoUwCVf9AZH47eL7SBrfvfAk_pe8Wi5OO9GOTSjp0g%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=04ee0084ded94effb8b8160f19207c1d&_t=GKA2q9UZ5ydBa8fNL6BAOK5zkaW_Sl8jpy0z6IwHp10lApOTEOuaDrNqVnkjmvxqNccPiAgIwOpiE7IGoLunfFr2c4qHPJhcrK-_g5Gq-evyGeif5SXz1vG0ljTUCX4jdVDnnl_IV29iwMDTKDBNtowJaZ29GlpBueOpn70lum0%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04ee0084ded94effb8b8160f19207c1d&_e=ZiEFuS5bHSfjSc8TtAoREKOI5nX-huQnwP29s_vQoHD_SKqi498lM6u1bYA9yx6eBmkZe1cR1pKjLd5IP8E66ai-RhPeA3a6VXYjHO4xTSb3-nxjSTYIP1nRzjFCBkiycdleaomS0TPBwmO5k5P5rke-RMlz9LarJiNxlthCvWVgfLJlulYQJ6GQsMKSy9qSGj4pXq-PGOhRi0_BKsNjknkr4Es6yXCaYzIKX9151zkxhS_qT2gTchQHe8sWTotSu7YY6-6A3Csid2z0rYmzRFN5hZgJGcWe8U64ibKR-Yk%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04ee0084ded94effb8b8160f19207c1d&_e=zUduPrinepr6oF6I7WtA-N1wJMjdySBUTe7lQnrq1LXVQUrc8q-j6jxiV0xFd91uQjg29fi-Mb8CWJWR8qgv3oCuP4Sd0ohu1AdGbHnpI-4bEtwddBLbkjR3IrKOw3uiSy4rta5RiRFT0Lgd6fp3DTevx-zSk7Nuxrd98iYQ6tJMpnxiD1f6bvMmAg-KavREoxMXZTm_m8AC4H55Tbkua1x8g3INhb6LufPsmk2KhWU%3D)_

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42cb2d81c77e4e26bbed1fd3b3061e8e&_e=4o22F8r4NvjQaBPDdi0QwM3Ho8bRTvg--Hv9oq9FORp878OYq8vkxuhRcFngcjzlgbMLqEoLA-PfRvZxhawZMAqwUNBGdkTGahwtViGQ9dZiS_DpHdnYpOUv8eors0Uo1-zk2iWvM-VEKJgW5NSJMI8NaWd9NJihmaRd38VJ9eF-DGPmvyGePFKcnl9bTuKl1NsTnrVHKZWprtvZ9m6R73ica9kj7LAX6QBrUtJk2p_SVsN-2ZlC84lQQiR_M--jYr0B7Tlocl5tusskvuN_x9v5iBenEN3Q-JidkbfMSspVWu0nR-cOeCn6qswZS9uMPWpPzaJHgixDmZi3sBmPp67VRULWAj_CnsXdhmG64wtmTTYC84oI_cVL6s0ghzlOaDwnc-THdih5R5CrlT_XzA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42cb2d81c77e4e26bbed1fd3b3061e8e&_e=4o22F8r4NvjQaBPDdi0QwM3Ho8bRTvg--Hv9oq9FORp878OYq8vkxuhRcFngcjzlgbMLqEoLA-PfRvZxhawZMAqwUNBGdkTGahwtViGQ9dZiS_DpHdnYpOUv8eors0Uo1-zk2iWvM-VEKJgW5NSJMI8NaWd9NJihmaRd38VJ9eF-DGPmvyGePFKcnl9bTuKl1NsTnrVHKZWprtvZ9m6R73ica9kj7LAX6QBrUtJk2p_SVsN-2ZlC84lQQiR_M--j3FHOBTk1tQZ05T8LykduGaEr7CReUG6kP2mDzIgVFs2CkYhK3V7n6qImKKMvlENwhSU7_zzLcAcRFleMwGZTf1hK9JgrMh3BL_ZuyOceWRPl5AJp6hURK1nPJDFpBxq6pGT_gmo_JswZOh7Y50O0jw%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42cb2d81c77e4e26bbed1fd3b3061e8e&_e=4o22F8r4NvjQaBPDdi0QwM3Ho8bRTvg--Hv9oq9FORp878OYq8vkxuhRcFngcjzlgbMLqEoLA-PfRvZxhawZMAqwUNBGdkTGahwtViGQ9dZiS_DpHdnYpOUv8eors0Uo1-zk2iWvM-VEKJgW5NSJMI8NaWd9NJihmaRd38VJ9eF-DGPmvyGePFKcnl9bTuKl1NsTnrVHKZWprtvZ9m6R73ica9kj7LAX6QBrUtJk2p_SVsN-2ZlC84lQQiR_M--jNMxQrYtj2mrG_f7fxlQCSvzoeKI6RLIqIcOTN1bpPXfcRYYku8oYx5l7-NGSpTmTD5pKJuV6a_DfYMhyU6UqFpmhB-qt3Q1vWx1wHOpr7iH2b9C58TCU5MICb6Sa8TsjuKvuhC83zm9ydJ_X2mrlyQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42cb2d81c77e4e26bbed1fd3b3061e8e&_e=4o22F8r4NvjQaBPDdi0QwM3Ho8bRTvg--Hv9oq9FORp878OYq8vkxuhRcFngcjzlgbMLqEoLA-PfRvZxhawZMAqwUNBGdkTGahwtViGQ9dZiS_DpHdnYpOUv8eors0Uo1-zk2iWvM-VEKJgW5NSJMI8NaWd9NJihmaRd38VJ9eF-DGPmvyGePFKcnl9bTuKl1NsTnrVHKZWprtvZ9m6R73ica9kj7LAX6QBrUtJk2p_SVsN-2ZlC84lQQiR_M--jXrOxR6ocXVXT2mrVrULpDNwgaZSq5wI6MH-07sLLtFE1nihhFaSueqAVHw1a-xCdfQfMFuHzq8oIZ_3m_MftB1f4aFaOlUM5159I8cISo7hQ-OltEm2mK7M2RhBkwD-1UpLZXOyBEo9VKbYOVabMtg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42cb2d81c77e4e26bbed1fd3b3061e8e&_e=4o22F8r4NvjQaBPDdi0QwM3Ho8bRTvg--Hv9oq9FORp878OYq8vkxuhRcFngcjzlgbMLqEoLA-PfRvZxhawZMAqwUNBGdkTGahwtViGQ9dZiS_DpHdnYpOUv8eors0Uo1-zk2iWvM-VEKJgW5NSJMI8NaWd9NJihmaRd38VJ9eF-DGPmvyGePFKcnl9bTuKl1NsTnrVHKZWprtvZ9m6R73ica9kj7LAX6QBrUtJk2p_SVsN-2ZlC84lQQiR_M--jhGtMcjJHn2UMJZCAFMlS66ml2FNIHUeby3_1VDLW5UMQQYMEkOo400xhJp0sVYd78qowI4LZejF-xC1QywT4X86PgU2w0gub61U1WTPWp1lnqMB5GDIlquP14-LokeH592_GcZ-xo0ua8FPy77BQGw%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Your America
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zY%2bW21eEv6FEVjtODGHKJQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4t8Ak4MvZDiF71aOoJ%2b%2bvw&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27001%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cgDWVquLQZjfuRw8NRX78w&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27002%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=30zKIWsBANp1W2kKrHkzPg&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._
