[**July 4, 1864:** The Statue of Liberty was gifted to the American people by France. The colossal statue was presented to Levi Morton, the American minister to France at the time and future Vice President, in a ceremony in Paris. Later the statue was disassembled and transported to America. The statue was meant to commemorate the friendship between the French and American people, but now represents American liberty and is viewed as a welcoming site to immigrants. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3eefb71e6dc449978629f045db351062&_e=1wCtqNt5mGJgWa0VDF8pHDsafP-Jo0sbY7qO60tWkfiAq-NPRQ7_vM68A8zdZoIsXYFv6B9o52mnNEADwjV5kPZ3PmlyOBG9Rh4ztDbCZx6CtBhxy9WWvUGdVPmNQttzFgRfLHUIRD30uZGVIqgc6ownxzEBe_54x9DDjsdovhJD4EMND_ZJVVXrmLk93-BaEYUL53C0CW3XGTRgeQjreXVoefYntOvNgRnsNPQbolmsef4Lxpvbd3dbI4aT_fCi) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3eefb71e6dc449978629f045db351062&_e=1wCtqNt5mGJgWa0VDF8pHDsafP-Jo0sbY7qO60tWkfiAq-NPRQ7_vM68A8zdZoIsXYFv6B9o52mnNEADwjV5kPZ3PmlyOBG9Rh4ztDbCZx4U0S2kcbV-YICGNobNr8u-MrTLtrB8Ekr04diAPFTuWLZNdjxQODMsaYJgcKUm7u4V37koLt7TqyIJgj8emCt9vdN5C2RpPulqtDe3bzSIBEbAsCD0WD3WIa8xc0dNgdgUyIU5Jvu_yLKKEOmSq17c)**

subject: Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸
body:
Happy Independence Day! | | | |
---
| Happy Independence Day!
---
| | |
---
| Hi friends! Happy Independence Day to you and your family! 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

America is truly a great & exceptional nation. The ideals in our Declaration of Independence - “that all men are created equal, that they are endowed by their Creator with certain unalienable Rights”- are amazing ideals to stand to uphold. Independence Day is not only about freedom from another nation - Independence Day comes from an idea. It is a celebration of freedom from tyranny, totalitarian government control, & any philosophy that separates & divides people into immovable classes, & more.

America is not the land of division. America is the land of liberty, freedom, equal justice under the law, a free economy, intrinsic value for every human life, & so much more. I thank God for His provision & protection for America - in spite of our nation’s challenges - and I look forward to many years more! I have tremendous hope and faith in God for America’s future.

My wife Lisa and I are proud to be Americans! America’s best days are still ahead! Let’s celebrate!

God bless you, & God bless America.

\- Jerry, Lisa, Michael, & Levi Evans

**_Follow me on one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: God Bless America! 🙏
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-amljty-trhiujldw-m/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Independence Day!**
**Incompetence** A new action report claims the Biden administration**[lacked "a sufficient sense of urgency"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-y/) **when planning for the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan in August 2021. _Why hasn't anyone been fired for this yet?_ **Buttigieg is Reaching** Mayor Pete has accused the Colorado graphic designer who sued the state over its anti-discrimination law **[of getting into the business to provoke a case like this.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-j/)** **Biden Won't Give Up** Biden isn't finished [**trying to salvage his plan** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-t/)to offer student loan relief to millions of borrowers. **No Allegiance to Country** Douglas Murray calls violent protests in France **[a lesson for America on 'open-borders immigration'.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-i/)**

**Hunter Was Here** A white powder was found in the White House's West Wing and trigged an emergency hazardous material call to the fire department. **[You won't believe what they found!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-d/)** [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-h/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-k/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-n/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-p/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amljty-trhiujldw-x/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-amljty-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-c) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-amljty-trhiujldw-q/)

name: Adam Frisch
subject: reflecting on our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Today, as I was marching in the Fourth of July parade, I was reflecting on our country – and our democracy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65953330/414939817/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTFhY2ZkOS1iNzFhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e7wbtF3-f5dmiKhugzqDncIANSFlxTYYHC8dnkOwyQA=&emci=fbbff8a3-b51a-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b11acfd9-b71a-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65953331/414939818/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTFhY2ZkOS1iNzFhLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e7wbtF3-f5dmiKhugzqDncIANSFlxTYYHC8dnkOwyQA=&emci=fbbff8a3-b51a-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=b11acfd9-b71a-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Today, during our Fourth of July parade, I was reflecting on our country – and our democracy.
It’s a miracle that America ever came to be. A democratic republic, where power is peacefully given up and transferred, where the rule of law matters, where _the truth_ matters, and where every person is given equal opportunity to thrive and succeed. That is the promise of America.
There are some in Washington – like my opponent Lauren Boebert – who still try to divide us, though. Who try to put us in corners separated by “red” and “blue.” Who are more interested in ego and personal gain than protecting our democracy. And who are too distracted with headlines and fueling an _angertainment_ industry to put in the work or do what’s right.
The last few years have shown us all that democracy can be a fragile thing. But while we face many threats as a nation, I still believe that America’s promise, her leadership, and the vision that our Founding Fathers had will always overcome – as long as there are those willing to defend them.
And after I defeat Lauren Boebert and am sworn in as the next congressman from Colorado’s third congressional district, I promise to always uphold my sacred oath to defend the Constitution from all enemies – both foreign and domestic.
In forming a more perfect union, America’s best days will always be ahead of us.
Happy Fourth of July!
With gratitude -
Adam

| | Friend,

---
I’ve already told you how shadowy special interest RINOs are plotting to spend $300 million to try and destroy our campaign in the primary.

---
And while we will certainly counter these turncoat cowards at every turn, don’t think for one second that our eye isn’t still on the prize...

---
**There is only one __REAL__ mission in 2024: FIRING the most corrupt President in our nation’s history – Crooked Joe Biden – and SAVING AMERICA. **

---
That’s why I’ve made sure that even while RINO mega-donors throw millions of dollars worth of attack ads at us, _our campaign is making early investments like never before where it matters most._

---
In the first quarter of _this year_ , I launched our **Battleground Victory Fund** to ensure we could compete with Biden and the Democrats’ warchest in each of the biggest battleground states of 2024.

---
_And Biden’s campaign has already announced which states it plans to target the most: Michigan, Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania._

---
**Make no mistake, Friend, this election may very well come down to just a few thousand votes in __only_ _one__ of these key states. **

---
But with your support TODAY, I have no doubt that whichever state decides the fate of 2024, we _will_ WIN BACK the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

---

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Enjoy your holiday!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Happy Fourth of July! Today we recognize the significance of our democracy and every citizen that stands up to make our democracy great. Together we celebrate our country and remind one another to continue on fighting for our freedom and rights.

We’ve come a long way since our founding, and we have further still to go. I’m honored to be a part of that work.

I hope you’re able to take some time today to reflect on the promise of America.

Wishing you and your family a happy and safe 4th of July holiday.

Mike
